basic_details.job_title: DTU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for JRF/SRF and Field Worker Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has released the official JRF/SRF and Field Worker Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of vacancies have been announced under the DTU JRF/SRF and Field Worker Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Master's degree (M.Tech/M.E./M.S./M.Sc), B.Tech in Electronics Engineering/Electronics Science/RF & Microwave Engineering/Communication Engineering/Embedded Systems/AI & Data Science or related fields, or Graduation with relevant experience can participate in the walk-in interview scheduled for 15 June 2026. The official notification PDF and

age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree (M.Tech / M.E. / M.S /M.Sc)/B.Tech in Electronics Engineering /Electronics Science / RF & Microwave Engineering / Communication Engineering / Embedded Systems / AI & Data Science or related field, Graduation with some experience
qualification.details: JRF/SRF: Master's degree (M.Tech / M.E. / M.S /M.Sc)/B.Tech in Electronics Engineering /Electronics Science / RF & Microwave Engineering / Communication Engineering / Embedded Systems / AI & Data Science or related field. MTech/M.E. with no experience and M.S /M.Sc/B.Tech with 1 year of experience. Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA in postgraduate studies. Field Worker: Graduation with some experience.

salary_details.details: JRF/SRF: Consolidated as per sanctions Field Worker: Consolidated as per sanctions

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15 June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application fee for JRF/SRF and Field Worker posts at DTU?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts as per the information available.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF/SRF position?
faq.answer: For JRF/SRF, a Master's degree (M.Tech / M.E. / M.S /M.Sc) or B.Tech in specific electronics-related fields is required, with experience criteria depending on the degree obtained.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for the Field Worker post?
faq.answer: The Field Worker position requires a Graduation degree along with some relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for JRF/SRF and Field Worker posts?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there are 0 vacancies for both JRF/SRF and Field Worker positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for DTU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Delhi Technological University (DTU) in Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.
